# Interface: WebsiteSpecification

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:216](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L216)

The `website` facet — page chain entry handed out by
`specification.website()`. Setup methods chain; action methods are
terminal. `.visit()` renders the page in the shared browser; `.fetch()`
performs one raw HTTP exchange and never follows redirects.

## Properties

```ts
fetch: (path) => Promise<FetchResult>;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:221](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L221)

Perform one raw HTTP GET — redirects surface as 3xx results, never followed.

#### Parameters

| ------ | ------ |
| `path` | `string` |

### visit

```ts
visit: (path, scenario?) => Promise<PageResult>;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:227](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L227)

Render the page in the shared browser and resolve with the captured
document. With a scenario, the visitor interacts first (the When) and
the capture reflects the FINAL page state.

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `path` | `string` |
| `scenario?` | [`VisitScenario`](../type-aliases/VisitScenario.md) |
